rules.rule_text: The wording of therapeutic indications in the SmPC must comply with EMA guidance for assessors of centralised applications, including guidance on wording of therapeutic indications.
rules.verbatim_quote: Wording of therapeutic indication — A Guide for Assessors of Centralised Applications
cross_references: EMA guideline on wording of therapeutic indication
A Guide for Assessors of Centralised Applications

rules.rule_text: When relevant, a bodyweight limit must be included in the wording of a paediatric indication in SmPC section 4.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: When is it relevant to include a bodyweight limit in the wording of a paediatric indication?
rules.exceptions: Only applicable when bodyweight limit is clinically relevant to the paediatric indication.
cross_references: EMA guideline on paediatric indications

rules.rule_text: The investigation of subgroups in confirmatory clinical trials must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.1, 4.3, 4.4, and 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the investigation of subgroups in confirmatory clinical trials
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the investigation of subgroups in confirmatory clinical trials

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC, labelling, and package leaflet for advanced therapy medicinal products (ATMPs) containing genetically modified cells must follow the dedicated ATMP core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on core SmPC, Labelling and Package Leaflet for advanced therapy medicinal products (ATMPs) containing genetically modified cells.
rules.exceptions: Applies specifically to ATMPs containing genetically modified cells.
cross_references: Guideline on xenogeneic cell-based medicinal products
Regulation (EC) No 1394/2007 on advanced therapy medicinal products

rules.rule_text: For anti-infectives containing thiomersal, the warning statement relating to sensitisation must be implemented in SmPC sections 4.3, 4.4, and 4.8.
rules.verbatim_quote: CHMP position paper on thiomersal implementation of the warning statement relating to sensitisation
rules.exceptions: Applies to anti-infectives for systemic use containing thiomersal.
cross_references: CHMP position paper on thiomersal

rules.rule_text: The clinical evaluation of vaccines must be reflected in SmPC sections 4 and 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on clinical evaluation of vaccines
cross_references: EMA Guideline on clinical evaluation of vaccines

rules.rule_text: Clinical development data for medicinal products for the treatment of HIV infection must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.1, 4.4, 4.5, and 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the clinical development of medicinal products for the treatment of HIV infection
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the clinical development of medicinal products for the treatment of HIV infection

rules.rule_text: Evaluation data for medicinal products indicated for treatment of bacterial infections must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.1, 4.2, 4.4, and 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the evaluation of medicinal products indicated for treatment of bacterial infections
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the evaluation of medicinal products indicated for treatment of bacterial infections
Addendum to the guideline on the evaluation of medicinal products indicated for treatment of bacterial infections

rules.rule_text: The addendum to the guideline on evaluation of medicinal products for treatment of bacterial infections must also be applied to SmPC sections 4.1, 4.2, 4.4, and 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Addendum to the guideline on the evaluation of medicinal products indicated for treatment of bacterial infections
rules.exceptions: Supplementary to the main bacterial infections guideline.
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the evaluation of medicinal products indicated for treatment of bacterial infections

rules.rule_text: Clinical evaluation data for antifungal agents for treatment and prophylaxis of invasive fungal disease must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.1, 4.2, 4.5, 4.4, 5.1, and 5.3.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the clinical evaluation of antifungal agents for the treatment and prophylaxis of invasive fungal disease
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the clinical evaluation of antifungal agents for the treatment and prophylaxis of invasive fungal disease

rules.rule_text: Points to consider on pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics in the development of antibacterial medicinal products must be addressed in SmPC section 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: *Points to consider on pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics in the development of antibacterial medicinal products
cross_references: EMA Points to consider on pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics in the development of antibacterial medicinal products

rules.rule_text: QT/QTs interval prolongation and proarrhythmic potential data (per ICH E14) must be considered for cardiovascular system products.
rules.verbatim_quote: ICH E14 The Clinical Evaluation of QT/QTs Interval Prolongation and Proarrhythmic Potential for Non-Antiarrhythmic Drugs
rules.exceptions: Applies to non-antiarrhythmic drugs with cardiovascular signal.
cross_references: ICH E14 guideline

rules.rule_text: Clinical investigation data for medicinal products in the treatment of lipid disorders must be reflected in the SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment of lipid disorders
cross_references: EMA Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment of lipid disorders

rules.rule_text: Regulatory requirements for authorisation of low-dose modified release ASA formulations in secondary prevention of cardiovascular events must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.1 and 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Position paper on the regulatory requirements for the Authorisation of low-dose modified release ASA formulations in the secondary prevention of cardiovascular event
rules.exceptions: Specific to low-dose modified release ASA formulations.
cross_references: EMA Position paper on regulatory requirements for low-dose modified release ASA formulations

rules.rule_text: Clinical investigation data for medicinal products in the treatment of hypertension must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.1 and 4.2.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment of hypertension
cross_references: EMA Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment of hypertension

rules.rule_text: Clinical investigation data for medicinal products in the treatment of epileptic disorders must be addressed in the SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: * Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment of epileptic disorders
cross_references: EMA Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment of epileptic disorders

rules.rule_text: Information on selective serotonin uptake inhibitors (SSRIs) and dependency/withdrawal reactions must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.2 and 4.8.
rules.verbatim_quote: Background to the CPMP position paper on selective serotonin uptake inhibitors (SSRIs) and dependency/withdrawal reactions
cross_references: CPMP position paper on SSRIs and dependency/withdrawal reactions

rules.rule_text: Clinical investigation data for medicinal products for the treatment of insomnia must be reflected in SmPC section 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on medicinal products for the treatment of insomnia
cross_references: EMA Guideline on medicinal products for the treatment of insomnia

rules.rule_text: Clinical investigation data for medicinal products for the treatment of Multiple Sclerosis must be reflected in SmPC section 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment of Multiple Sclerosis
cross_references: EMA Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment of Multiple Sclerosis

rules.rule_text: Clinical development data for medicinal products for the treatment of pain must be addressed in the SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the clinical development of medicinal products intended for the treatment of pain
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the clinical development of medicinal products intended for the treatment of pain

rules.rule_text: Clinical investigation data for medicinal products, including depot preparations, in the treatment of schizophrenia must be addressed in the SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products, including depot preparations, in the treatment of schizophrenia
rules.exceptions: Includes specific provisions for depot preparations.
cross_references: EMA Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment of schizophrenia

rules.rule_text: Clinical development data for medicinal products for the treatment of cystic fibrosis must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.1 and 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the clinical development of medicinal products for the treatment of cystic fibrosis
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the clinical development of medicinal products for the treatment of cystic fibrosis

rules.rule_text: Requirements for clinical documentation for orally inhaled products (OIP), including requirements for demonstration of therapeutic equivalence between two inhaled products for use in asthma and COPD, must be reflected in SmPC section 4.2.
rules.verbatim_quote: *Requirements for clinical documentation for orally inhaled products (OIP) including the requirements for demonstration of therapeutic equivalence between two inhaled products for use in the treatment of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease …
rules.exceptions: Guideline marked as under review (*). Applies to OIP products in asthma and COPD.
cross_references: EMA Requirements for clinical documentation for orally inhaled products

rules.rule_text: Investigation of drug interactions must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.3, 4.4, 4.5, 5.1, and 5.2.
rules.verbatim_quote: Investigation of drug interactions
cross_references: EMA Guideline on Investigation of drug interactions

rules.rule_text: Evaluation of pharmacokinetics in patients with impaired hepatic function must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.2, 4.3, 4.4, 4.5, and 5.2.
rules.verbatim_quote: Evaluation of the pharmacokinetics of medicinal products in patients with impaired hepatic function
cross_references: EMA Guideline on evaluation of the pharmacokinetics of medicinal products in patients with impaired hepatic function

rules.rule_text: Evaluation of pharmacokinetics in patients with decreased renal function must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.2, 4.3, 4.4, and 5.2.
rules.verbatim_quote: Evaluation of the pharmacokinetics of medicinal products in patients with decreased renal function
cross_references: EMA Guideline on evaluation of the pharmacokinetics of medicinal products in patients with decreased renal function

rules.rule_text: Investigation of pharmacokinetics in the obese population must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.2 and 5.2.
rules.verbatim_quote: Reflection paper on investigation of pharmacokinetics in the obese population
cross_references: EMA Reflection paper on investigation of pharmacokinetics in the obese population

rules.rule_text: Pharmacokinetic and clinical evaluation of modified release dosage forms must be addressed in the SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the pharmacokinetic and clinical evaluation of modified release dosage forms
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the pharmacokinetic and clinical evaluation of modified release dosage forms

rules.rule_text: Pharmacogenetic methodologies used in pharmacokinetic evaluation of medicinal products must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.2, 5.1, and 5.2.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the use of pharmacogenetic methodologies in the pharmacokinetic evaluation of medicinal products
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the use of pharmacogenetic methodologies in the pharmacokinetic evaluation of medicinal products

rules.rule_text: Key aspects for the use of pharmacogenomics in the pharmacovigilance of medicinal products must be addressed in the SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on key aspects for the use of pharmacogenomics in the pharmacovigilance of medicinal products
cross_references: EMA Guideline on key aspects for the use of pharmacogenomics in the pharmacovigilance of medicinal products

rules.rule_text: Clinical investigation data for medicinal products in the treatment or prevention of diabetes mellitus must be addressed in the SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment or prevention of diabetes mellitus
cross_references: EMA Guideline on clinical investigation of medicinal products in the treatment or prevention of diabetes mellitus

rules.rule_text: Clinical investigation of immunosuppressants for solid organ transplantation must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.1, 4.2, 4.4, and 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Clinical investigation of immunosuppressants for solid organ transplantation
cross_references: EMA Clinical investigation of immunosuppressants for solid organ transplantation

rules.rule_text: Evaluation of anticancer medicinal products in man and its Appendix 3 (SmPC mock-up for anticancer medicinal products for section 4.8) must be applied to SmPC section 4.8.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the evaluation of anticancer medicinal products in man and its Appendix 3 (SmPC for an Anticancer medicinal product – mock-up of 4.8)
rules.exceptions: Appendix 3 provides a specific mock-up structure for section 4.8 of anticancer product SmPCs.
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the evaluation of anticancer medicinal products in man

rules.rule_text: The use of patient-reported outcome (PRO) measures in oncology studies must be reflected in SmPC section 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Appendix 2 to the guideline on the evaluation of anticancer medicinal products in man - The use of patient-reported outcome (PRO) measures in oncology studies
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the evaluation of anticancer medicinal products in man, Appendix 2

rules.rule_text: Immune tolerance induction in haemophilia A patients with inhibitors must be addressed in SmPC section 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Reflection paper on Immune Tolerance Induction in haemophilia A patients with inhibitors
cross_references: EMA Reflection paper on Immune Tolerance Induction in haemophilia A patients with inhibitors

rules.rule_text: Pharmaceutical development of medicines for paediatric use must be addressed in the SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on pharmaceutical development of medicines for paediatric use
cross_references: EMA Guideline on pharmaceutical development of medicines for paediatric use
Regulation (EC) No 1901/2006 on medicinal products for paediatric use

rules.rule_text: Clinical investigation data for medicinal products to prevent development/slow progression of chronic renal insufficiency must be reflected in SmPC section 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the clinical investigation of medicinal products to prevent development/slow progression of chronic renal insufficiency
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the clinical investigation of medicinal products to prevent development/slow progression of chronic renal insufficiency

rules.rule_text: Clinical investigation data for medicinal products for treatment of rheumatoid arthritis must be reflected in SmPC section 4.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Clinical investigation of medicinal products for treatment of rheumatoid arthritis
cross_references: EMA Clinical investigation of medicinal products for treatment of rheumatoid arthritis

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC for radiopharmaceuticals must comply with the dedicated radiopharmaceuticals core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on core summary of product characteristics of radiopharmaceuticals
cross_references: EMA Guideline on core summary of product characteristics of radiopharmaceuticals

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for fludeoxyglucose (18F) must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on core summary of product characteristics and package leaflet for fludeoxyglucose (18F)
cross_references: EMA Guideline on core SmPC and package leaflet for fludeoxyglucose (18F)

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for technetium (99mTc) sestamibi must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on core summary of product characteristics and package leaflet for technetium (99mTc) sestamibi
cross_references: EMA Guideline on core SmPC and package leaflet for technetium (99mTc) sestamibi

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for technetium (99mTc) macrosalb must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core summary of product characteristics (SmPC) and package leaflet for technetium (99mTc) macrosalb
cross_references: EMA Core SmPC and package leaflet for technetium (99mTc) macrosalb

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for (99Mo/99mTc) generator must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on core SmPC and package leaflet for (99Mo/99mTc) generator
cross_references: EMA Guideline on core SmPC and package leaflet for (99Mo/99mTc) generator

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for sodium fluoride (18F) must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on core SmPC and Package Leaflet for sodium fluoride (18F)
cross_references: EMA Guideline on core SmPC and Package Leaflet for sodium fluoride (18F)

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for nanocolloidal technetium (99mTc) albumin must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on core SmPC and package leaflet for nanocolloidal technetium (99mTc) albumin
cross_references: EMA Guideline on core SmPC and package leaflet for nanocolloidal technetium (99mTc) albumin

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for (68Ge/68Ga) generator must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on core SmPC and Package Leaflet for (68Ge/68Ga) generator
cross_references: EMA Guideline on core SmPC and Package Leaflet for (68Ge/68Ga) generator

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for sodium iodide (131I) for therapeutic use must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SmPC and package leaflet for sodium iodide (131 I) for therapeutic use
rules.exceptions: Specific to sodium iodide (131I) for therapeutic use.
cross_references: EMA Core SmPC and package leaflet for sodium iodide (131I) for therapeutic use

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for iopamidol 300 must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core summary of product characteristics (SmPC) and package leaflet for iopamidol 300
cross_references: EMA Core SmPC and package leaflet for iopamidol 300

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for iopamidol 370 must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core summary of product characteristics (SmPC) and package leaflet for iopamidol 370
cross_references: EMA Core SmPC and package leaflet for iopamidol 370

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for gadoteric acid must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core summary of product characteristics (SmPC) and package leaflet for gadoteric acid
cross_references: EMA Core SmPC and package leaflet for gadoteric acid

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for gadopentetate dimeglumine must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core summary of product characteristics and package leaflet for gadopentetate dimeglumine
cross_references: EMA Core SmPC and package leaflet for gadopentetate dimeglumine

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC and package leaflet for fluorodopa (18F) must comply with the dedicated core SmPC guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core summary of product characteristics (SmPC) and package leaflet for fluorodopa (18F)
cross_references: EMA Core SmPC and package leaflet for fluorodopa (18F)

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human fibrinogen products must comply with the dedicated core SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SmPC for human fibrinogen products
rules.exceptions: Applies to blood products — human fibrinogen.
cross_references: EMA Core SmPC for human fibrinogen products

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for hepatitis B vaccines for intramuscular use must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for hepatitis B for intramuscular use
rules.exceptions: Specific to intramuscular hepatitis B vaccines.
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for hepatitis B for intramuscular use

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for hepatitis B vaccines for intravenous use must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for hepatitis B for intravenous use
rules.exceptions: Specific to intravenous hepatitis B vaccines.
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for hepatitis B for intravenous use

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC for human Anti-D immunoglobulin for intravenous use must comply with the dedicated guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the core SmPC for human Anti-D immunoglobulin for intravenous use
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the core SmPC for human Anti-D immunoglobulin for intravenous use

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC for human Anti-D immunoglobulin for intramuscular use must comply with the dedicated guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the core SmPC for human Anti-D immunoglobulin for intramuscular use
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the core SmPC for human Anti-D immunoglobulin for intramuscular use

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human plasma derived von Willebrand factor products must comply with the dedicated core SPC.

cross_references: EMA Clinical investigation of human plasma derived von Willebrand factor products
EMA Core SPC for human plasma derived von Willebrand factor

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human varicella immunoglobulin for intramuscular use must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for human varicella immunoglobulin for intramuscular use
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for human varicella immunoglobulin for intramuscular use

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human rabies immunoglobulin for intramuscular use must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for human rabies immunoglobulin for intramuscular use
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for human rabies immunoglobulin for intramuscular use

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human tetanus immunoglobulin for intramuscular use must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for human tetanus immunoglobulin for intramuscular use
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for human tetanus immunoglobulin for intramuscular use

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human tick-borne encephalitis immunoglobulin for intramuscular use must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for human tick-borne encephalitis immunoglobulin for intramuscular use
rules.exceptions: Specific to intramuscular tick-borne encephalitis immunoglobulin.
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for human tick-borne encephalitis immunoglobulin for intramuscular use

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human albumin solution must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for human albumin solution
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for human albumin solution

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human prothrombin complex products must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for human prothrombin complex products
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for human prothrombin complex products

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human plasma coagulation factor VII products must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for human plasma coagulation factor VII products
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for human plasma coagulation factor VII products

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for plasma-derived fibrin sealant/haemostatic products must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for plasma-derived fibrin sealant/haemostatic products
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for plasma-derived fibrin sealant/haemostatic products

rules.rule_text: The core SmPC for human normal immunoglobulin for intravenous administration (IVIg) must comply with the dedicated guideline and core SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SmPC for human normal immunoglobulin for intravenous administration (IVIg)
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the clinical investigation of human normal immunoglobulin for intravenous administration (IVIg)
EMA Core SmPC for human normal immunoglobulin for intravenous administration (IVIg)

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human plasma derived antithrombin must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for human plasma derived antithrombin
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for human plasma derived antithrombin

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human normal immunoglobulin for subcutaneous and intramuscular use must comply with the dedicated core SPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SPC for human normal immunoglobulin for subcutaneous and intramuscular use
rules.exceptions: Applies to subcutaneous and intramuscular routes.
cross_references: EMA Core SPC for human normal immunoglobulin for subcutaneous and intramuscular use

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human plasma derived and recombinant coagulation factor VIII products must comply with the dedicated core SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Core SmPC for human plasma derived and recombinant coagulation factor VIII products
rules.exceptions: Covers both plasma-derived and recombinant factor VIII.
cross_references: EMA Core SmPC for human plasma derived and recombinant coagulation factor VIII products

rules.rule_text: The SmPC for human plasma derived and recombinant coagulation factor IX products must comply with the dedicated core SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: * Core SmPC for human plasma derived and recombinant coagulation factor IX products
rules.exceptions: Guideline marked as under review (*). Covers both plasma-derived and recombinant factor IX.
cross_references: EMA Core SmPC for human plasma derived and recombinant coagulation factor IX products

rules.rule_text: The maximum shelf-life for sterile products for human use after first opening or following reconstitution must be addressed in the SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Maximum shelf-life for sterile products for human use after first opening or following reconstitution
cross_references: EMA guideline on maximum shelf-life for sterile products

rules.rule_text: The pharmaceutical quality of inhalation and nasal products must be reflected in SmPC sections 2, 4.2, and 6.4.
rules.verbatim_quote: * Guideline on the pharmaceutical quality of inhalation and nasal products
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the pharmaceutical quality of inhalation and nasal products

rules.rule_text: Q&A on graduation of measuring devices for liquid dosage forms must be reflected in SmPC section 4.2.
rules.verbatim_quote: Q and A on specific types of product - graduation of measuring devices for liquid dosage forms
rules.exceptions: Applies to liquid dosage forms with measuring devices.
cross_references: EMA Q and A on specific types of product - graduation of measuring devices for liquid dosage forms

rules.rule_text: Storage conditions in product information of medicinal products and for active substances must be declared in the SmPC in accordance with the EMA guideline on declaration of storage conditions.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on declaration of storage conditions: A: in the product information of medicinal products B: for active substances
rules.exceptions: Covers both finished product and active substance storage declarations.
cross_references: EMA Guideline on declaration of storage conditions

rules.rule_text: The quality of transdermal patches must be addressed in the SmPC in accordance with the dedicated quality guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on quality of transdermal patches
rules.exceptions: Specific to transdermal patch dosage forms.
cross_references: EMA Guideline on quality of transdermal patches

rules.rule_text: Administration of oral immediate release medicinal products through enteral feeding tubes must be addressed in SmPC sections 4.2 and 6.6.
rules.verbatim_quote: Administration of oral immediate release medicinal products through enteral feeding tubes
rules.exceptions: Applies to oral immediate release products.
cross_references: EMA Quality of medicines questions and answers

rules.rule_text: Dry product inhalers must be addressed in SmPC section 6.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Specific type of products – Dry product inhalers
rules.exceptions: Specific to dry powder inhaler products.
cross_references: EMA Quality of medicines questions and answers

rules.rule_text: Needle safety systems must be addressed in SmPC sections 3, 4, 6, 6.5, and 6.6.
rules.verbatim_quote: Specific types of product - Needle safety systems
rules.exceptions: Specific to products with needle safety systems.
cross_references: EMA Quality of medicines questions and answers

rules.rule_text: Eye drop products must be addressed in SmPC sections 3, 4, 6, 6.5, and 6.6.
rules.verbatim_quote: Specific types of product - Eye drops
cross_references: EMA Quality of medicines questions and answers

rules.rule_text: Particles originated from container closure systems must be addressed in SmPC sections 3, 4, 6, 6.5, and 6.6.
rules.verbatim_quote: Particles originated from the container closure system
cross_references: EMA Quality of medicines questions and answers

rules.rule_text: The warning on transmissible agents must be included in SmPC sections 4.4 and 4.8 for plasma-derived medicinal products.
rules.verbatim_quote: Warning on transmissible agents in summary of product characteristics (SPCs) and package leaflets for plasma derived medicinal products
cross_references: EMA guideline on warning on transmissible agents in SPCs and package leaflets for plasma-derived medicinal products
Directive 2001/83/EC

rules.rule_text: Description of composition of pegylated (conjugated) proteins in the SmPC must follow the dedicated guideline, reflected in sections 2, 5.1, and 5.2.
rules.verbatim_quote: Description of composition of pegylated (conjugated) proteins in the SPC
cross_references: EMA guideline on description of composition of pegylated (conjugated) proteins in the SPC

rules.rule_text: Potency labelling for insulin analogue containing products, with particular reference to the use of 'international units' or 'units', must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.2, 4.4, and 5.1.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on potency labelling for insulin analogue containing products with particular reference to the use of "international units" or "units"
cross_references: EMA Guideline on potency labelling for insulin analogue containing products

rules.rule_text: Quality aspects included in the product information for vaccines for human use must be reflected in SmPC sections 1, 2, 3, 4, 6.1, 6.2, 6.3, 6.4, 6.5, and 6.6.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on quality aspects included in the product information for vaccines for human use
rules.exceptions: Specific to vaccines for human use.
cross_references: EMA Guideline on quality aspects included in the product information for vaccines for human use

rules.rule_text: The quantitative composition and potency labelling of biological medicinal products that contain modified proteins as active substance must comply with the dedicated declaration guideline.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the declaration of the quantitative composition / potency labelling of biological medicinal products that contain modified proteins as active substance
rules.exceptions: Specific to biological medicinal products with modified proteins as active substance.
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the declaration of the quantitative composition / potency labelling of biological medicinal products that contain modified proteins as active substance

rules.rule_text: Carcinogenicity evaluation data for medicinal products for the treatment of HIV infection must be reflected in SmPC section 5.3.
rules.verbatim_quote: Guideline on the carcinogenicity evaluation of medicinal products for the treatment of HIV infection
cross_references: EMA Guideline on the carcinogenicity evaluation of medicinal products for the treatment of HIV infection

rules.rule_text: Risk assessment of medicinal products on human reproduction and lactation from data to labelling must be reflected in SmPC sections 4.3, 4.6, and 5.3.
rules.verbatim_quote: * Risk assessment of medicinal products on human reproduction and lactation: from data to labelling
cross_references: EMA guideline on risk assessment of medicinal products on human reproduction and lactation: from data to labelling

rules.rule_text: SWP/NcWP recommendations on the duration of contraception following the end of treatment with a genotoxic drug must be reflected in SmPC section 4.6.
rules.verbatim_quote: SWP/NcWP recommendations on the duration of contraception following the end of treatment with a genotoxic drug
cross_references: EMA SWP/NcWP recommendations on the duration of contraception following the end of treatment with a genotoxic drug

rules.rule_text: Environmental risk assessment of medicinal products for human use must be addressed in the SmPC.
rules.verbatim_quote: Environmental risk assessment of medicinal products for human use
cross_references: EMA guideline on environmental risk assessment of medicinal products for human use
Directive 2001/83/EC
Directive 2004/27/EC
